entries.description: Component-scoped override point (`list`) read in `packages/dbx-form/src/lib/forge/field/selection/list/_list.scss` — set it (from an app, or via the owning dbx directive where one exists) to override; unset, it falls back to `300px`.

intents: pickable item field list content max height
entries.description: Component-scoped override point (`pickable`) read in `packages/dbx-form/src/lib/forge/field/selection/pickable/_pickable.scss` — set it (from an app, or via the owning dbx directive where one exists) to override; unset, it falls back to `400px`.
